prose:
## Ferrocene Fukui Reactivity Indices

**Property:** Fukui reactivity indices (electrophilic f⁺, nucleophilic f⁻, and dual descriptor).

**Level of theory:** GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding method, xtb program).

**Geometry provenance:** User-supplied ferrocene.xyz (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz); no geometry optimization was performed — these are single-point Fukui indices at the provided geometry.

**Solvent:** Gas phase (no implicit solvation).

**Charge and multiplicity:** Neutral (charge 0, multiplicity 1); the protocol also computed cation (charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anion (charge −1, multiplicity 2) to derive the Fukui indices.

**Method details:** Fukui indices were computed via finite-difference charge distributions using the Mulliken population scheme of GFN2-xTB. Partial charges were evaluated at three charge states (neutral, +1 cation, −1 anion), each at their respective ground-state multiplicities.

**Convergence and integrity:** All calculations converged successfully. Charge conservation checks passed: Σ(f⁺) = 1.0000 and Σ(f⁻) = 1.0000, confirming proper normalization of the Fukui indices.

**Key Results:**

The **most electrophilic site** (most susceptible to nucleophilic attack) is:
- **Iron (Fe, atom 11, 1-indexed)** with f⁺ = **0.22885456**

The **most nucleophilic site** (most susceptible to electrophilic attack) is:
- **Iron (Fe, atom 11, 1-indexed)** with f⁻ = **0.25938191**

The **dual descriptor** at iron (f⁺ − f⁻) is **−0.030527354**, indicating that the iron center is slightly more nucleophilic than electrophilic overall.

Fukui indices for all 21 atoms (in order: C, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H, H, Fe, C, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H, H):

- **Fukui (f⁺):** [0.013638348, 0.013638348, 0.013638174, 0.013638597, 0.013638174, 0.063476418, 0.063476418, 0.063476206, 0.063475831, 0.063476206, 0.22885456, 0.013638348, 0.013638348, 0.013638174, 0.013638597, 0.013638174, 0.063476418, 0.063476418, 0.063476206, 0.063475831, 0.063476206]

- **Fukui (f⁻):** [0.012179196, 0.012179196, 0.012179338, 0.012179313, 0.012179338, 0.061882787, 0.061882787, 0.061882375, 0.061882339, 0.061882375, 0.25938191, 0.012179196, 0.012179196, 0.012179338, 0.012179313, 0.012179338, 0.061882787, 0.061882787, 0.061882375, 0.061882339, 0.061882375]

- **Fukui (f⁰, dual descriptor):** [0.012908772, 0.012908772, 0.012908756, 0.012908955, 0.012908756, 0.062679603, 0.062679603, 0.06267929, 0.062679085, 0.06267929, 0.24411824, 0.012908772, 0.012908772, 0.012908756, 0.012908955, 0.012908756, 0.062679603, 0.062679603, 0.06267929, 0.062679085, 0.06267929]

- **Dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻):** [0.0014591519, 0.0014591519, 0.0014588363, 0.0014592841, 0.0014588363, 0.0015936308, 0.0015936308, 0.001593831, 0.0015934927, 0.001593831, −0.030527354, 0.0014591519, 0.0014591519, 0.0014588363, 0.0014592841, 0.0014588363, 0.0015936308, 0.0015936308, 0.001593831, 0.0015934927, 0.001593831]
